objects.script: fn on_update(dt) { let started = get_var("wander_started"); if started != true { play_animation("duck", "wander"); set_var("wander_started", true); } }
fn on_grab(hand, point) { grab_at_point("rifle", point, hand); } fn on_release(hand) { release_grip("rifle", hand); }
fn on_grab(hand, point) { grab_at_point("pistol", point, hand); } fn on_release(hand) { release_grip("pistol", hand); }
